events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse image: Evacuation decay test pump isolated. Microns @ isolation t=0 = 383. Microns @ t=10 min = 4167. So pressure rose from 383 microns to 4167 microns in 10 min. That's huge decay, indicates leak or outgassing/moisture. In HVAC-R evacuation, standing decay test should not rise more than certain threshold, typically 500 microns over some time or manufacturer spec. Rise from 383 to 4167 = 3784 microns in 10 min. Fail. Risk? Leak means air/moisture ingress, high maybe critical? Since system not charged? It's evacuated, but if isolated and decaying, leak. Could be defective brazing or evacuation. Component condition installed-defective, non-compliant. Decision fail. Work_stage tested/inspected. percent_complete maybe 80? value = 4167 (10-minute reading). confidence high. rate = rise per minute = (4167-383)/10 = 378.4 microns/min. event_time 10.0. sound_source not asked empty string? Schema says string. Use "". order empty list. workable empty list. findings: excessive micron rise during standing decay test, indicates leak or contamination/moisture; brazing/evacuation non-compliant. actions: locate and repair leak, replace drier, re-evacuate, re-test decay per OEM. rationale: pressure rose 3784 microns in 10 min far exceeds acceptable decay; system cannot hold vacuum, leak present or moisture outgassing; fail until corrected. references: EPA 608 (proper evacuation), mfr specs. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "tested/inspected",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 75,
  "value": 4167,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 10.0,
  "rate": 378.4,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Micron level rose from 383 to 4167 microns in 10 minutes during isolated standing decay test",
    "Excessive vacuum decay indicates a leak or significant moisture/contamination",
    "Brazing and/or evacuation work does not meet acceptable holding criteria"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Leak-check the system using approved method (e.g., electronic leak detector, nitrogen pressure test)",
    "Repair any leaks and re-braze as needed",
    "Replace filter-drier and re-evacuate to manufacturer-specified microns",
    "Repeat standing decay test until vacuum holds within OEM/EPA 608 limits"
  ],
  "rationale": "A properly evacuated and sealed system should hold a deep vacuum with minimal rise during a standing decay test. The observed rise of 3,784 microns in 10 minutes is far beyond acceptable limits, indicating a leak or contamination. The system fails inspection until corrected and re-tested.",
  "references": ["EPA 608", "OEM evacuation and decay-test specifications"]
}
